apply: Apply the concept of reflex action to explain the response of the nervous system to stimuli
Use the concept of reflex arc to explain the response of the nervous system to stimuli
Apply the concept of synapse to explain the transmission of nerve impulses
analyze: Analyze the role of the nervous system in controlling and coordinating various functions of the body
Compare and contrast the structure and functions of the central nervous system and peripheral nervous system
Evaluate the importance of neurotransmitters in transmission of nerve impulses
remember: Recall the structure and functions of the nervous system (central nervous system and peripheral nervous system)
Describe the different types of neurons and their functions
Identify the parts of a neuron and explain their role in transmission of nerve impulses
understand: Explain the process of synaptic transmission and its types
Describe the role of neurotransmitters in transmission of nerve impulses
Explain the mechanism of action potential and its characteristics

ncert_objectives: Explain the structure and function of neurons and neural networks.
Describe the process of synaptic transmission and the role of neurotransmitters.
Discuss the mechanism of action potential and the characteristics of resting and action potentials.
Explain the concept of reflex action and the reflex arc.
Describe the structure and function of the central nervous system and the peripheral nervous system.
board_exam_objectives: To recall the structure and functions of the nervous system.
To explain the process of synaptic transmission and the role of neurotransmitters.
To describe the mechanism of action potential and its characteristics.
To explain the concept of reflex action and the reflex arc.
To describe the structure and function of the central nervous system and the peripheral nervous system.
